creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
well, the error isn't really supposed to happen.  It's a situation where the data has lost its integrity for some reason (dependencies aren't processed correctly?).  Moreover, the cause of the error is not known, so the message can't be more specific.

Regarding qt4-assistant, it looks like the problem happened at Mk/ recently and may already be fixed: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=416088

You just happened to catch it when it was broken.  Try again after updating the tree!
